name: Cashier
starter_behavior: Stay near a service counter and resolve customer payment/order tasks before restocking tasks.
notes: Cashiers keep sales moving. They should not leave the sales room unless no customer tasks exist.

name: Baker
starter_behavior: Prioritize known recipes on the menu, then refill prep stock for high-demand recipes.
notes: Bakers are recipe-gated by known_recipes and station access.

name: Runner
starter_behavior: Move tablet deliveries from warehouse intake to useful storage, then supply kitchen stations.
notes: Runners make the warehouse matter without forcing the player to micromanage every crate.

name: Cleaner
starter_behavior: Fix mess that affects customer patience first, then maintain kitchen utility points.
notes: Cleaners create a soft pressure system in busy layouts.

name: Manager
starter_behavior: Provide passive forecast and scheduling bonuses instead of occupying a production station.
notes: Managers are later-game pressure relief for planning and demand spikes.
